scripts.dev:backend: dotenv -e ports.env -- npm run dev -w backend
scripts.dev:frontend: dotenv -e ports.env -- npm run dev -w frontend
scripts.dev:broker: dotenv -e ports.env -- npm run dev -w wrapped-gemini-broker
scripts.dev:process: dotenv -e ports.env -- npm run watch -w wrapped-gemini-process
scripts.dev: dotenv -e ports.env -- concurrently -n "BACK,FRNT,PROC,BROK,EMBD,MCP" -c "blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan,red" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:process" "npm run dev:broker" "npm run dev:embedder" "npm run dev:mcp"
scripts.dev:delay: npm run dev:backend:delay & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev:mcp: dotenv -e ports.env -- npm run dev -w mcp
scripts.rec-install: npm install && cd packages/shared && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../mcp && npm install
